title: Grilled British Grape Nuts Pilaf
description: A light and herbal weeknight dish featuring grape nut cereal grilled to perfection for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil and salt until well combined.
Place the grape nuts in a shallow dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil mixture over the grape nuts and toss gently until evenly coated.
Grill the coated grape nuts for about 2-3 minutes on each side, watching closely to prevent burning. The goal is to have them lightly toasted rather than charred.
Once done, transfer them to a plate or serving dish, adding fresh basil leaves on top if desired.
